steps.title: Spot the decisive evidence
steps.content: The decisive clue is the dramatic disparity in probabilities: 0.20 for countries open to foreign-capital inflows versus 0.03 for countries with restrictive policies. This massive gap demonstrates that policy environment directly influenced swap-line outcomes.

steps.title: Apply the signal to the choices
steps.content: ”Material to” means important for or significant to—precisely how policy environments functioned relative to swap-line allocation. The other three either wrongly reverse causality or wrongly claim independence. That matches choice A — A is correct.
